name: Zoho CRM
tagline: Affordable CRM with deep customisation for growing businesses
description: Zoho CRM is a feature-rich, budget-friendly CRM platform that rivals Salesforce at a fraction of the cost. Part of the broader Zoho suite, it offers deep customisation, AI-powered insights, and tight integration with 40+ Zoho apps.
use_cases: You want Salesforce-level CRM customisation — custom modules, Blueprint process builder, territory management — at a fraction of the cost
Your team already uses Zoho Desk, Zoho Books, or Zoho Projects and wants tight native integration across the Zoho ecosystem
You need AI-powered lead scoring and deal predictions via Zia without paying for a Salesforce Einstein licence
You're a growing SMB that needs advanced workflow automation and multichannel communication (email, phone, social, WhatsApp) in one CRM
